_capture_metadata.captured_from: Synthesized from the failure mode where vLLM hits max_tokens mid-emission of a leak shape. The closing `</tool_call>` (or `<|/tool_calls|>`) is never reached, so the regex shape match fails.
_capture_metadata.purpose: Graceful degradation: a partial/truncated leak shape must NOT produce malformed structured tool_calls. Recovery should skip rather than try to half-extract. finish_reason=length is the giveaway that vLLM hit the budget.
